Clues · by Clues.ai

Clues likes to stretch out

Its panels need a bit of room to breathe - about 1300 × 410 px - and this window is a touch smaller right now.

Pop the window to full size, or hop onto a larger screen, and you're in. On a phone? Email yourself a link to clues.ai and open it on your computer to drop in your CSVs and start building.

Received a Clues session? Presentations play right here, on any screen:

You seem to be viewing this inside an email or file preview, which cannot run apps - nothing here will respond. On a computer: download this file and double-click it. On a phone: ask the sender for the .clue session file and open it at clues.ai.
